mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 1.81% is below the long-run neutral rate, signaling monetary accommodation. This low policy rate sustains demand-side pressures and inflation expectations, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as markets price in future rate normalization and inflation risk premium.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days despite FEDFUNDS remaining below 2.5% and CPIAUCSL showing month-over-month growth, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 6.1% is elevated relative to pre-pandemic levels, indicating slack in the labor market. Persistent labor slack suppresses wage growth and inflation expectations, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to decline as markets reduce long-term inflation and growth forecasts.
regime_hint: post-shock labor market recovery with slack
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises over 60 trading days in periods when UNRATE > 5.5%, or the correlation between UNRATE and 10-year yield changes sign and remains negative for > 6 months.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales at 375,473 million dollars combined with housing starts at 895 thousand units signal robust consumer and residential demand. Strong demand growth increases inflation expectations and real economic growth forecasts, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher as term premium and growth expectations expand.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days despite both RSAFS and HOUST showing month-over-month growth, or the joint signal (RSAFS + HOUST momentum) produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 110.3034 (index 2017=100) shows supply-side capacity utilization. If INDPRO growth decelerates while demand remains firm, supply constraints tighten, raising inflation expectations and causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as markets price in persistent inflation from supply-demand imbalance.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month growth < 0.2% while RSAFS growth > 0.5%
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days when the trigger condition is met, or the interaction signal (INDPRO weakness + RSAFS strength) produces negative Rank IC over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment at 137,318 thousand persons shows labor market strength. Sustained employment growth increases household income and consumption, raising inflation expectations and real growth forecasts. This causes the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as markets price in higher future inflation and economic activity.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 5 trading days in periods of positive PAYEMS month-over-month growth, or the signal produces Rank IC < 0.02 over any 6-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP at 11,727.4 billion chained 2017 dollars (quarterly) combined with declining housing starts (895 thousand) signals demand deceleration in the residential sector despite overall growth. This mixed signal suggests economic momentum is fading, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to decline as growth expectations moderate.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises over 60 trading days when HOUST declines > 2% despite GDPC1 growth, or the interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.03 over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI at 218.88 (index 1982-1984=100) combined with federal funds rate at 1.81% produces a deeply negative real policy rate. This monetary accommodation persists despite inflation, signaling central bank tolerance for price growth. Markets respond by raising long-term inflation expectations, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise.
regime_hint: negative real rates with inflation persistence
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days when real policy rate is negative and CPIAUCSL shows acceleration, or the interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 110.3034 shows supply capacity near trend. If INDPRO growth accelerates above 0.5% month-over-month while UNRATE remains elevated above 5.5%, this signals supply-side improvement without full labor market tightening, reducing inflation pressure and causing the 10-year Treasury yield to decline.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises over 60 trading days when INDPRO accelerates and UNRATE remains elevated, or the interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.03 over any 24-month rolling window.
